title: Coordinate, Timezone and Identity Source Hierarchy
india_identity_priority: Reviewed official LGD manual export snapshot
india_coordinate_priority: Survey of India or approved Government geospatial dataset
Official State/UT or municipal geospatial publication
global_identity_priority: UN or intergovernmental official country/capital source
global_coordinate_priority: UN or international authoritative geographic dataset
SimpleMaps Basic World Cities as CC BY 4.0 candidate source
GeoNames or equivalent gazetteer as secondary cross-check
prohibited_direct_promotion_sources: User-supplied capital checklist without authoritative source review
